response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience across multiple languages and domains, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking — all mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor’s thesis work and outdated NI LabWindows™/CVI contributions, insufficient for a mid-senior C++ capital markets position.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated expertise in CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No professional C++ on Windows platform experience as required
Lacks capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed but not contextualized in financial systems or high-volume trading environments
